title: Safe Prompting Guide
body: Use direct, task-focused prompts and avoid sharing sensitive identifiers.

title: Upload Workflow
body: Select files, verify in selection tab, then send updates to backend.

title: Admin Checklist
body: Watch buffer size, rejection trends, and recent security events.

title: Simulation Visibility
body: Scenario list and current round metrics are exposed when simulation mode is on.

title: Troubleshooting
body: If backend is unreachable, verify API base URL and server port.
